text.title: AI-Assisted Interview Note Synthesis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Do we have N >= 3 interviews and a redaction policy?

conclusion.verdict: Manual analysis only; the three-source rule cannot apply.
Stop until redaction policy exists; sensitive content cannot enter LLM pipeline.

branch.when: n_interviews >= 3 AND redaction_policy != null AND researcher_available == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full synthesis with human verification.

branch.when: n_interviews >= 3 AND redaction_policy != null AND researcher_available == false

conclusion.verdict: Halt at synthesis; do not publish without verified_by.

example.trace: n_interviews=8 → redaction_policy=yes → researcher_available=true → full synthesis + verification.
